description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding wooden cabinet with a warm reddish-brown finish and a smooth, flat top surface. The front face features two columns of three horizontal drawers each, separated by a central vertical divider, with subtle grooves indicating the drawer separations. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain visible and no additional decorative elements or hardware. The cabinet appears solid and sturdy, likely constructed from medium-density wood or wood composite. The top surface is broad and can be used to support other objects, such as decor or equipment. There are no visible handles or glass panels, and the drawers are flush with the cabinet face, giving it a minimalist, modern appearance.
description: A rectangular, reddish-brown wooden cabinet with six front drawers and a smooth, flat top. The design is minimalist, with no visible handles or glass panels.
description_view_0: Side view showing a plain, flat wooden panel with visible wood grain and no features.
description_view_1: Back view displaying a wide, unadorned wooden surface with a consistent reddish-brown finish.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing a plain wooden panel with subtle grain variation.
description_view_3: Front view revealing six horizontal drawers in two columns, separated by a central divider, with no visible handles.
